yesterdayStoryline.headline: Mexico open with win as record three reds mar curtain-raiser
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: El Tri beat South Africa 2-0 at the Azteca; South Korea fought back to edge Czechia and sit level atop Group A.

todayStoryline.headline: Canada christen home World Cup; USA begin against Paraguay
todayStoryline.subtitle: Canada play the first men's World Cup match on home soil against Bosnia; the USMNT open Group D in Los Angeles.

yesterday.note: 🟥 Sithole 49', Zwane 84' (RSA) · Montes 90+2' (MEX) · WC opener red-card record

lines: Mexico dominated possession at 60% and pressed from a fluid 4-1-4-1 shape.
It is Mexico's first win in eight World Cup openers, amid a record three reds.
South Korea built through possession, completing 464 passes to Czechia's 242.
The comeback lifts Korea level with Mexico atop Group A on three points.

facts.home: This is the first men's World Cup match ever played on Canadian soil.
facts.away: Bosnia reached the finals by beating four-time champions Italy in a play-off shootout.

facts.home: The USA's first World Cup match was a 3-0 win over Paraguay in 1930.
facts.away: Paraguay return to the World Cup for the first time since 2010.

news.headline: Trump calls off fresh Iran strikes, says ceasefire deal could come within days
news.body: President Trump said he had cancelled planned military strikes on Iran and that Washington was close to a settlement to wind down the war. He said a memorandum of understanding extending the April ceasefire could be signed within days, allowing more time for nuclear talks.

20260612.footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs

todayStoryline.headline: World Cup 2026 kicks off in Mexico City; Shakira opens at Estadio Azteca
todayStoryline.subtitle: Mexico face South Africa — a reverse of the 2010 opener that ended 1-1. South Korea v Czechia closes day one in the tournament's first 3am UK kickoff.

facts.home: Mexico played the first match in World Cup history — a 4-1 loss to France on 13 July 1930.
facts.away: South Africa's first match as a unified nation came in 1992 after a 16-year FIFA ban.

facts.home: Their 2002 semi-final run remains Asia's deepest finish at any World Cup.
facts.away: Predecessor Czechoslovakia reached two World Cup finals (1934, 1962) and lost both.

news.headline: Trump warns Iran 'will pay the price' as US strikes follow Apache downing
news.body: The US military completed strikes against Iran in response to a downed Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz, with Trump saying Tehran has stalled ceasefire talks. Israeli operations in southern Lebanon overnight killed at least 13 people.

20260611.footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
